name: Winter's Protection
additional_info: Increases the time it takes for the Second Layer's parasites to kill you. Negates weather-reliant damage buffs such as Frostdraw's increased damage when its snowing or Thundercall's increased damage when it's raining.
desc: Your tightly-bound winter gear negates elemental damage buffs from weather on damage against you. Also seems to provide some resistance to the Gale.
